name: Day 60 — listing audit
prompt: One-time on day 60. Pull every KIND2 ASIN. Score each: title length, bullets, A+ content, image count, video, schema. Output prioritised improvement list.

name: Monday review monitoring
prompt: Pull last 7 days of Amazon reviews per ASIN. Flag <4★ for Customer Service triage. Surface top quote per ASIN to Creative library.
